subcodes.first_line: O My leaf and My Afnán! Thy Lord maketh mention of thee from within the Most Great Prison. Verily, He made mention of thee ere thy being, and in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و افنانی یذکرک مولیک فی السجن الاعظم انه ذکرک قبل وجودک و فی هذه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @praise and encouragement
